text:
(or those
who live in hamlets), Yavanas, Kiratas (traders?), gamblers and
flowers are destroyed.
[The commentator construes Vanik as kiratas. Sometimes
Sindhu and Sauvira are mentioned as one region. It lies between
the Jhelum and the Indus. Here Utpala takes them as different
names. However, according to Alberuni, Sauvira stands for Multan
andjahravar. Sura§tra corresponds to the Kathiawad peninsula.
The word Surat is the corruption af Surastra. Pratyanta is a
bordering country occupied by Mlecchas.]
When Saturn sojourns in the asterism Aslesa, aquatic objects
or animals, as well as snakes are destroyed; when he tenants the
1. I.AXB. ppi 93-9fi.

116 Brhat Samhitu
star Magha, the Bahlikas, Ginas, Gandharas, Sulikas, Paratas,
traders (or Vaisyas), godowns and Kiratas come to grief.
[Bahlika is the modern Bactria or Balkh in the north of
Afghanistan. Gandhara country extended from the Kabul valley
to Tak^asila. Sulikas, otherwise known as Gulikas, were the people
